name: Supernatural Danger Zone
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>超</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>自</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>然</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぜん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>警</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>戒</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>区</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>く</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>域</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>いき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If a non-Effect Monster is Special Summoned face-up (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 card your opponent controls; destroy it. If this card in its owner's Spell & Trap Zone is destroyed by an opponent's card effect: You can Special Summon 1 non-Effect Monster from your hand, Deck, or GY. You can only use each effect of "Supernatural Danger Zone" once per turn.
eff: If a non-Effect Monster is Special Summoned face-up (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 card your opponent controls; destroy it. If this card in its owner's Spell & Trap Zone is destroyed by an opponent's card effect: You can Special Summon 1 non-Effect Monster from your hand, Deck, or GY. You can only use each effect of "Supernatural Danger Zone" once per turn.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
misc: Requires control of specific Monster type
